raw.official description: After using Updraft, heal for 30 health per second until Freja touches the ground.
Every 3 Final Blows, gain bonus ultimate charge.
raw.ability details: * 33% [[ultimate charge]] is granted over 1.9 seconds upon the third final blow. * If Freja reaches 3 stacks when her ultimate ability is already available, the refund is stored and Freja gains the bonus charge after using her ultimate. More than one refund cannot be stored. * The progress is indicated next to the ultimate meter. * The progress persists even after being eliminated. * Ultimate final blows also count toward the bonus. * Self-damage final blows with No results and No results do not count toward the bonus. * [[File:Ability-ashe4.png|sub|link=Ashe#B.O.B.|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Ashe#B.O.B.|B.O.B.]] counts as a [[deployable]] and therefore does not count toward the bonus. * Upon receiving the bonus after eliminating the third enemy, a money animation will play above them.

raw.official description: Enemies hit by 3 regular bolts in quick succession are slowed by 20% for 2 seconds.
raw.ability details:
* ''Removed in Season 18.''
* The counter resets if the player is not hit again within 0.5 seconds. Missing a shot does not reset the counter.
* Cannot trigger again on the same target until the slow has ended.

raw.official description: Direct hits with Take Aim reveal enemies to Freja for 3 seconds.
Quick Dash distance is increased by 20%.
Updraft grants a temporary free use of Quick Dash.
Direct hits with Take Aim refund 8 automatic bolt ammo.
Critical health enemies are revealed to you.
raw.ability details:
* ''Removed in Season 18.''
* Enemies revealed this way can be pinged through walls.

raw.shot type: [[File:Swift_Step_Icon.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Movement ability|Movement ]] Movement
raw.official description: Vault in the direction you're moving and refresh Take Aim.
raw.ability details: * If no horizontal movement input is given, Freja is propelled upward instead. * Can be used without interrupting [[File:Take_Aim.png|middle|link=Freja#Take Aim|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Freja#Take Aim|Take Aim]].

raw.shot type: [[File:Swift_Step_Icon.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Movement ability|Movement ]] Movement
raw.official description: Launch upward with a gust of wind.
raw.ability details: * Freja can reach up to 8.4 meter height with Updraft. * Activating Updraft interrupts [[File:Take_Aim.png|middle|link=Freja#Take Aim|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Freja#Take Aim|Take Aim]].

abilities.name: Revdraw Crossbow

raw.ability details:
* Damage per second: 144.23 while firing (95.34 overall w/ reload)
* Can be fired while Take Aim is reloading.
* Maximum spread is reached at 12 shots.

raw.official description: Slow down your momentum to take aim with a high speed explosive bolt. Using Quick Dash refreshes Take Aim.
raw.cast time:
0.192 seconds (scope in)
0 + 0.5 seconds (bolt fired)
0.112 seconds (scope out without shot)
raw.ability details:
* Grants -90% gravity reduction.
** Due to this Freja can jump and reach higher with her abilities when Take Aim is activated right after.
* The bolt sticks to enemies and terrain upon impact, exploding 1 second after.
* Take Aim is automatically released when the bolt is fired.
* The direct hit of the arrow can headshot. The delayed explosion does not.
* When the button for Take Aim is released, it cannot be used again for 0.4 seconds.

shot_type: [[File:Ability-dva7.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Projectile|Projectile ]] Projectile [[File:Ability-parah3.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Area of effect|Area of effect ]] Area of effect

raw.official description: Fire an explosive bola. Hitting an enemy wraps them up and pulls in other nearby enemies.
raw.damage:
25 (direct hit)
75 (over time)
100 - 60 (explosion, enemy)
50 - 30 (explosion, self)
raw.ability details:
* If an enemy is directly hit by the bola, they will take additional damage and cause nearby enemies to be pulled to them.
** The main target will be [[Status effect#Mobility lock|hindered]], locking them out of movement abilities.
* After the bola impacts, it will deal periodic damage in an area for 1.4 seconds, slowing enemies within by 45%, and will then explode dealing damage in the area.
** Deals total of 200 damage to the main target and up to 175 damage to other enemies over the duration.
* Slows Freja by 90% during the final 0.5 seconds of the cast.
